Solutions development and senior analysis with focus on intelligent automation.
Comprehensive coverage of back office processes in the energy sector. Analysis and development of RPA technologies.

cookies.title: 🍪 Cookie Usage
cookies.description: We use cookies and local storage to remember your preferred language and improve your browsing experience. We don't share this information with third parties.
cookies.settingsDescription: Customize which cookies you want to allow in your browser.
cookies.settingsNote: You can change these preferences at any time from the settings button.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Full transparency about how we handle your information

dataCollection.title: Information We Collect
dataCollection.description: This web application collects minimal information to improve your experience:

cookies.title: Cookie and Local Storage Usage
cookies.description: We use the following storage technologies:

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: Necessary for basic site functionality (language and theme preferences).

preference.title: Preference Cookies
preference.description: Remember your settings for future visits (completely optional).

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.description: You have full control over your information:
rights.access: Access all information stored in your browser
rights.delete: Delete all information whenever you want
rights.modify: Change your preferences at any time
rights.contact: For any questions, contact us at:
